focus_hypotheses: A stronger composite semi-real probe should expose coupled top-name, top-right middle-name, and bottom signature failures that isolated probes miss.
A region-preference address parser candidate might recover the new probe, but it must be rejected immediately if official same-input replay regresses.

changes.summary: Added withholding_top_right_dual_confusion_probe combining top border clip, localized top-right overlay, and bottom overlap to stress coupled identity/date degradation.

discarded_candidates.candidate: withholding address region-preference and country-tail cleanup
discarded_candidates.reason: Although the candidate fixed the new semi-real probe and preserved the targeted 3-case real slice, official same-input replay regressed withholding address and name fields and therefore failed the promotion gate.

raw_ocr_drift_examples.address_region_raw: 1 Main Street Suite 1 New York NY 10o01 United States of America
raw_ocr_drift_examples.note: Current OCR replay already emitted the wrong ZIP token 10o01, so the replay regression is not attributable only to the discarded parser candidate.

raw_ocr_drift_examples.combined_text_excerpt: USER SAMPLE10 USER 210-30-2010 United States of America US 15% 2026-01-11 SAMPLE10 J USER
raw_ocr_drift_examples.note: Current OCR replay lost the address region entirely and the full-page text no longer contains the street line, so parser-only promotion evidence is unreliable.

withholding_top_right_dual_confusion_pro.reason: The new composite probe is valuable coverage even though the parser candidate used to solve it was discarded.

baseline_comparison.note: No inference-time parser change was promoted in this iteration; the retained change is additional semi-real probe coverage only.

date_regression.note: The failed official replay did not regress signature_date; the discard decision was driven by address and applicant-name regressions.

next_priorities: Design a parser candidate that rescues the new top-right dual-confusion probe without relying on broad region-address preference.
Stabilize official same-input replay evidence for withholding synthetic inputs by separating OCR drift from parser-level changes before the next promotion attempt.
